summary: Frontend-only verification of new 'Deal from my favorites' feature at ZIP 10001. All 3 scenarios (empty state, single-mode deal, group-mode variant) pass.

empty_state.verdict: PASS — no deal-from-favorites button rendered with zero favorites

critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx still 1146 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline (unchanged from iter29). Consider splitting RevealStage/ShufflingDeck into separate modules.
FavoritesDrawer.jsx: favorite item key is `${r.name}-${r.address}` while other testids use r.id; keys should also use r.id for consistency/robustness.

dealFromFavorites in Home.jsx sets results=favorites then runs shuffle — this replaces the 'Nearby spots' grid with the favorites list. Intentional per PRD, but users leaving group vote / result may find it surprising that the nearby grid was replaced.
seed_data_creation: none (used live Google Places for ZIP 10001; favorites persisted via localStorage key ff_favorites)
context_for_next_testing_agent: New 'Deal from my favorites' feature verified. Home.jsx dealFromFavorites() correctly restricts shuffle pool to hearted spots; FavoritesDrawer only renders the CTA when favorites.length>0; label toggles to 'Deal 3 from favorites' when groupMode is on and drives GroupVote panel. Localstorage key: ff_favorites. Preview URL: https://lucky-bite-1.preview.emergentagent.com.
